name: 3D Third-Person
description: Third-person action-adventure template with an orbiting camera, smooth character rotation, sprint, and jump. The camera avoids clipping through walls using a spring-arm approach.
features: Orbiting third-person camera with mouse control
Spring arm collision avoidance (no wall clipping)
Smooth character rotation to face movement direction
Camera-relative movement (character moves relative to where the camera faces)
